function.name: known
function.description: Emit known facts, analysis, and conclusions as keyed entries. Required every turn.

key.description: Key name. Knowledge keys use /:known/ prefix. Empty string to delete.

function.name: summary
function.description: One-liner status update or answer. Required every turn. Max 80 characters.

function.name: unknown
function.description: Things you still need to find out.

function.name: read
function.description: Load a key's value into context. Key is a relative file path (src/app.js), a /:known/ entry, or a /:[tool]/ result.

key.description: Relative file path, /:known/ key, or /:[tool]/ key.

function.name: drop
function.description: Demote a key from context. Key is a relative file path, /:known/ entry, or /:[tool]/ result.

key.description: Relative file path, /:known/ key, or /:[tool]/ key.

reason.description: Why this is no longer relevant.

function.name: env
function.description: Run a read-only shell command to explore the environment (ls, grep, git log, etc).

function.name: prompt
function.description: Ask the user a multiple choice question.

function.name: run
function.description: Run a shell command that changes the environment (npm install, mkdir, etc).

function.name: delete
function.description: Delete a key. Removes file from disk if key is a file path, removes entry if /:known/ or /:[tool]/ key.

key.description: Relative file path, /:known/ key, or /:[tool]/ key.

function.name: edit
function.description: Create or modify a file. Do not describe changes in known/summary — put them here.

file.description: File path to modify or create.

search.description: Exact text to find and replace. Null when creating a new file or overwriting entirely.

replace.description: Replacement text, or full content for new files.
